flashcards.question: Geologic Time Scale
flashcards.answer: The division of Earth's 4.6-billion-year history into eons, eras, periods, and epochs

flashcards.question: Precambrian
flashcards.answer: The longest interval of Earth's history (~4 billion years); simple life, atmosphere formation

flashcards.question: Paleozoic Era
flashcards.answer: 'Ancient life' era (541–252 Ma); Cambrian explosion to Permian mass extinction

flashcards.question: Mesozoic Era
flashcards.answer: 'Age of dinosaurs' (252–66 Ma); dominated by reptiles; ended by asteroid impact

flashcards.question: Cenozoic Era
flashcards.answer: Current era (66 Ma–present); 'age of mammals'; includes human evolution
